config.target_policy: DWM next-vblank selected from runtime sample timestamp and DWM timing fields, matching DwmAwareCursorPositionPredictor.
config.label_policy: Linear interpolation between adjacent referencePoll samples at the target timestamp.

candidates.description: Current runtime stream baseline: last two runtimeSchedulerPoll samples, gain 0.75, DWM next-vblank target.
Add a small last3 acceleration term.
Use lower gain for DWM horizons >= 12ms.
Use lower gain for DWM horizons >= 8ms.
Use lower gain for DWM horizons >= 4ms.
Lower gain on late scheduler dispatch, long horizon, or high speed.
Use medium gain only for late scheduler dispatches.
Add a moderate last3 acceleration term.
Use lower gain only for late scheduler dispatches.
Hold current only when the UI-thread runtime sample arrived after the scheduler target vblank.
Hold current runtimeSchedulerPoll position until DWM target.

decision.recommendation: Keep current baseline; raw p99 improvements are too small and add visible regressions.
